description: This file contains SCSS styles for heading levels, display classes, emphasis styles, list styles, and blockquote formatting, including use of mixins and variables for styling.
external_files: variables and mixins files (implied by use of @include and variables like $lead-font-size)

methods.name: font-size()
methods.description: A mixin or function to set font size based on a variable.

methods.name: list-unstyled()
methods.description: A mixin to remove list styles and padding.
